popularStory.headline: About Bishop Denyson
popularStory.description:
About Bishop Denison
ID: I6818
Name: @Bishop Denison (Denyson)
Sex: M
Birth: 1513 in Thorley,England
Note: The history of Thorley reaches back before the year 1086, for the Manor of Thorley is me …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Denison於1534年7月9日出生在英國賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德時，他的父親John George Denison21歲，母親Ann Borodell17歲。他和Agnes Wiley至少有4個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1582年12月4日在他的家鄉享年48歲，埋葬在英國賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德。

nameMeanings.name: Denison
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of a Slavic patronymic from the personal name Denis or Denys , such as Russian Denisov or Ukrainian Denysenko or Denysevych.

variants.name: Dennison
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Denis (see Dennis ) + -son. Compare Tennyson .
English (of Norman origin): from Anglo-Norman French deinzein, a burgess who enjoyed the privileges of those living deinz la cité ‘within the city’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When John Denison was born on 9 July 1534, in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England, his father, John George Denison, was 21 and his mother, Ann Borodell, was 17. He had at least 4 sons and 5 daughters with Agnes Wiley. He died on 4 December 1582, in his hometown, at the age of 48, and was buried in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Denison est né le 9 juillet 1534, à Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, John George Denison, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Ann Borodell, avait 17 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles avec Agnes Wiley. Il est décédé le 4 décembre 1582, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Denison am 9. Juli 1534 in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John George Denison 21 und seine Mutter Ann Borodell 17. Er hatte mit Agnes Wiley mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 4. Dezember 1582 im Alter von 48 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Denison è nato il il 9 luglio 1534 nel Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England, il suo padre, John George Denison, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Ann Borodell, aveva 17 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie con Agnes Wiley. Morì il 4 dicembre 1582, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Denisonが1534年7月9日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアビショプ'ス ストルトフォードで生まれた時，父John George Denisonは21歳，母Ann Borodellは17歳であった。彼はAgnes Wileyとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1582年12月4日に故郷で48歳で死去し，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアビショプ'ス ストルトフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Denison(이)가 1534년 7월 9일 영국 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John George Denison(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann Borodell(은)는 17세였다. 그는 Agnes Wiley(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1582년 12월 4일 그의 고향에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드에 묻혔다.

Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas com Agnes Wiley. Ele faleceu em 4 de dezembro de 1582, em sua cidade natal, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Denison родился 9 июля 1534 г. в местности бишоп'с стортфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John George Denison было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Ann Borodell, 17. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей от Agnes Wiley. Он умер 4 декабря 1582 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности бишоп'с стортфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия.
